positive: A symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring stylized mythical flora, interwoven vines, and abstract planetary constellations. The central subject is a glowing crescent moon framed by intricate, repeating patterns in the style of geometric Art Nouveau meets fine linocut etching. Use a high-contrast, rich, limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and metallic antique gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for seamless screen printing on apparel. Crisp, sharp lines, strong silhouette definition, radial symmetry, flat graphic quality, dramatic celestial backlighting, high detail, commercial print artwork.
